text: 100g of fat. saturated fat is a major pressure point. for this category, the real question is fat quality.
0g of carbs. outside of that, the profile is pretty quiet. not relevant here.
0g of protein. everything else is kind of whatever. also not relevant here.
the rest of the section is nothing special.
minerals are basically not adding much here.

pros first: helps meals actually work because a fat that people can use well matters more than a theoretical one. small amounts can change a whole meal because that leverage matters when the fat quality is good. highly useful in cooking because practical culinary value matters here.

now the downsides: extremely calorie dense by default because that is the unavoidable category burden. not a complete food on its own because even the better fats are still just part of a meal. easy to overpour without noticing because practical portion creep is real.
C tier. Best only in small amounts when the cooking job matters more than the nutrition case.
